title: Orchestrator routing to {agent-sdk, ollama-local} LIVE through the gateway + capability-incompatible route (MCP@deepseek) refused/redirected

resolution-and-gating.summary: PASSED (5/5 + 2/2) — a Profile roleMap pointing a role at {agent-sdk, ollama-local} resolves through the provider-agnostic resolveRoute to the agent-sdk runtime-target; assertRouteCapability REFUSES MCP@deepseek (CapabilityError) and allows MCP@ollama; the REDIRECT path skips deepseek for the mcp-capable target. The RoutedGateway executes an agent-sdk target on the AgentSdkAdapter (not the PTY operative) and logs runtime/provider/model — proven with a stubbed pool + fake adapter.

live-route.cmd: live gateway turn via web-channel (:7083) → gateway (:4777) → routing → agent-sdk/ollama; verified + recorded
live-route.summary: PASSED LIVE — wired the agent-sdk execution branch into the live RoutedGateway (gateway-routing.mjs runAgentSdkTurn + gateway-pty.mjs runRoutedTurn branch). With the demo profile (fast→sdk-ollama-chat), a real channel message 'What is the capital of France?' routes through the orchestrator to agent-sdk/ollama-local/qwen3:0.6b and answers 'The capital of France is Paris.'; decisions.jsonl logs runtime=agent-sdk provider=ollama-local model=qwen3:0.6b. A hard message routes to claude-code/anthropic/opus. Captured in the verified walkthrough video.

notes: The agent-sdk runtime now executes LIVE through the orchestrator gateway. THE FIX that unblocked the live turn: a CHAT turn (lean promptMode auto-disables all built-in tools) is a clean fast path — the earlier block was the TOOL round trip, which the small local models can't complete. The rich /claude stream injects the off-screen agent-sdk reply + a runtime/model status badge so the web-channel UI shows it. Evidence: docs/autothing/evidence-index.json globalGate + the runtime/agent-sdk-orchestrated walkthrough.
